summary: Tested Face ID feature for Vastgoed Kiosk. All backend Face ID endpoints working correctly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Face ID column in Huurders tab, Face ID section in TenantModal, and FaceIdSettings component in Instellingen tab all rendering correctly with proper data-testid attributes.
seed_data_creation: Used existing company KEWALBANSING with PIN 5678. One tenant (Bharat Kewalbansing, A1) has Face ID registered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Face ID feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/kiosk/admin/tenants returns face_id_enabled field, /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face/admin-status, /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face/register-admin, /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face/admin (DELETE), /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/tenant/{tenant_id}/face/register, /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/tenant/{tenant_id}/face (DELETE), /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face/verify-tenant. Frontend: FaceIdSettings component at data-testid='face-id-settings', admin register button at data-testid='admin-face-register-btn', tenant modal face buttons at data-testid='tenant-modal-face-register-btn' and 'tenant-modal-face-delete-btn'.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/kiosk/admin/tenants: PASS - Returns face_id_enabled field for each tenant
backend_endpoints.GET /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face/: PASS - Returns admin face registration status
backend_endpoints.POST /api/kiosk/public/{company_id}/face: PASS - Verifies tenant face and returns matching tenant

frontend_ui.Huurders_tab_Face_ID_column: PASS - Face ID column header present in tenants table
frontend_ui.Huurders_tab_Face_ID_badges: PASS - Face ID status badges (Actief) shown for tenants with Face ID
frontend_ui.TenantModal_Face_ID_section: PASS - Face ID section with register/delete buttons shown when editing existing tenant
frontend_ui.Instellingen_FaceIdSettings: PASS - FaceIdSettings component renders with Beheerder and Huurder Face ID sections
frontend_ui.Admin_face_register_button: PASS - 'Gezicht registreren' button present for admin
frontend_ui.Tenant_face_list: PASS - List of tenants with Face ID status and register/delete options

notes: Webcam-based Face ID registration cannot be fully tested in headless browser - UI elements verified only
face-api.js models are served from /models in the public folder
Face descriptor is a 128-dimensional float array stored in MongoDB
